abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the S20 switch
abort.cannot_discover: Unable to discover MAC address of S20 switch. Please enter the MAC address.

progress.start_discovery:
Attempting to discover new S20 switches

This will take about 3 seconds

Discovery may fail if the switch is asleep. If your switch does not appear, please power toggle your switch before re-running discovery.
progress.title: Orvibo S20

discovery_failed.description: No S20 switches were discovered on the network. Discovery may have failed if the switch is asleep. Please power toggle your switch before re-running discovery.
discovery_failed.title: Discovery failed

yaml_deprecation.description: The device (MAC: {mac}, Host: {host}) is configured in `configuration.yaml`. The Orvibo integration now supports UI-based configuration and this device has been migrated to the new UI. Please remove the YAML block from `configuration.yaml` to avoid future issues.
yaml_deprecation.title: Legacy YAML configuration detected {host}

yaml_deprecation_import_issue.description: Attempting to import this device (MAC: {mac}, Host: {host}) from YAML has failed for reason {reason}. 1) Remove the YAML block from `configuration.yaml`, 2) Restart Home Assistant, 3) Add the device using the UI configuration flow.
yaml_deprecation_import_issue.title: Legacy YAML configuration import issue for {host}
